name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Creation (AWS)
notes: This Building Block defines when a user created a new policy version and set it to default(current) version. In AWS, a user with "iam:CreatePolicyVersion" permission can overwrite an existing policy, by creating a new version on top. An attacker can assign themselves the highest privileges, or revoke security managers permissions which are privilege escalation and defense evasion techniques.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Creation (AWS) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Change
when the event matches Audit Flags (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)true
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Creation (AWS) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Change
AND when the event matches Audit Flags (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)true
